summary: Tested operator-scoped data display and CRUD operations. All P0 and P1 features working correctly. Operator can create/view/edit/delete routes and vehicles. Analytics and Sales dashboards show operator-scoped data (70,000 FCFA revenue, 10 bookings).

test_credentials.operator: operator@test.com / testpassword123 (check 'I'm logging in as a service operator')

seed_data_creation: Created test routes and vehicles during testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All operator-scoped features verified and working. Operator (Musango Bus Service) can: 1) Create/edit/delete travel routes via POST/PUT/DELETE /api/travel/routes, 2) Create/edit/delete vehicles via POST/PUT/DELETE /api/vehicles/, 3) View their routes via GET /api/travel/management/my-routes (returns 5 routes), 4) View their vehicles via GET /api/vehicles/ (returns 4 vehicles), 5) See operator-scoped analytics via GET /api/analytics/overview (70,000 FCFA revenue, 10 bookings). Travel Management page at /management/travel shows Dashboard, Management, and Communications tabs. Sales Dashboard at /admin/sales shows operator-specific sales data.

P0_operator_create_routes.details: Operator can create routes with from_city, to_city, departure_time, arrival_time, price

P0_operator_create_vehicles.details: Operator can create vehicles with vehicle_name, vehicle_type, plate_number, total_seats

P0_operator_view_routes.details: Returns 5 routes, all belonging to Musango Bus Service (operator_id: 30c487d8-f8ef-4e80-8b14-1a68866071c8)

P0_operator_view_vehicles.details: Returns 4 vehicles, all belonging to Musango Bus Service

travel_management_page.test: Travel Management page loads with operator's routes and vehicles

data_isolation.test: Operator data is properly isolated from other operators
data_isolation.details: All routes and vehicles returned belong to the operator's organization
